title: LabyrinthMC Client Pack
description: Yet another simple highly optimized vanilla plus.
body:
# LabyrinthMC
## Yet another simple highly optimized vanilla plus
I made this modpack after some friends of mine asked me for a cool, original but lightweight vanilla plus. I decided to then publish it to the public because it came out to be extremely well-made.
## Screenshots

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Technical Notes
This is a dual part modpack, this means that for each release there is a client and a server version.
You are supposed to use the client pack only to access a server running the [server pack](https://modrinth.com/project/labyrinthmc-server), especially if you want to enjoy all the optimizations.
